db.name: IT access provisioning
db.desc: Still manual — not triggered by HCM Air

db.name: Recruitment handoff (Harbour ATS)
db.desc: HO only — Harbour to HCM Air

db.name: Salary / pay change
db.desc: Approval chain: Mgr → HR → Finance → HRSS

db.name: Payslip generation (MyView)
db.desc: No paper payslips from Go Live

db.name: Expenses
db.desc: Not in scope for Phase 1 — separate system

db.name: Leaver — record leaving date and reason
Headcount / workforce reporting
db.desc: HCM Air = single source of truth

db.name: Loyal Service
db.desc: System generated letters/Notification to the employee via MyView - HRSS to trigger the letter/notification as this requires HR Ops to confirm if EE can get the entitlement

db.name: Leavers Information Email
db.desc: We send an email where we confirm useful information to the employee (MyView access after leave date, Holiday Info, pension info, staff card info) - can this be automated?

db.name: Holiday Purchase for Leavers
db.desc: Stop the Holiday Purchase Pay element on the previous month and calculate the accrued purchased holidays

db.name: HMRC Starter checklist / P45
db.desc: EE to complete the form on MyView

db.name: Intercompany Transfer
db.desc: Currently a manual process - Change of Pay Group

db.name: Advances
db.desc: How will this flow going forward?

db.name: Self-Service : Name Change
db.desc: This will trigger change in email, building pass name, needs validation against marriage certificate

db.name: Head Office Overtime/ On Call Payments for IT
db.desc: Need to be included into MyView for Managers to record? Validated by HRSS?

db.name: Casual Holiday Payment
db.desc: Can this be built into the system as a automated calc based on the hours worked

db.name: Recommend a Friend
db.desc: Does this need to be still AD Hoc as is and how do we process these?

db.name: FMS Inputs
db.desc: HRSS currently inputs into FMS any amendments to pay- do we keep using this process or can we build a workflow on the system whereby HRSS inputs on HCM Air and a validation notification goes to Simon to validate the input? (to avoid the FMS spreedsheet)

db.name: Benefits
db.desc: HRSS currently inputs into FMS any PMI, STL, Holiday purchase - do we keep using this process as Benefits are not integrated into HCM AIR?

db.name: DEA and Court Orders
db.desc: Is still still uploaded on the Portal?

db.name: Probationary Letters
db.desc: Currently a manual process - can the system send reminders and outcome letters to employees/managers with validation from HR?

db.name: Outbound References
db.desc: Can these be automated once Onboard goes live?

db.name: Other Paid Leave
db.desc: How do we enter these? MyView or T&A? Pay elements to be considered: Suspension, Sabbatical
